title: thuja pendula
intro: Thuja pendula, also known as Eastern Arborvitae or Eastern White Cedar, is a slow-growing, evergreen coniferous tree native to eastern North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Thuja pendula include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory problems, and combat fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Thuja pendula can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, coughs, and colds.
